nasb.text: You went forth for the salvation of Your people, For the salvation of Your anointed. You struck the head of the house of the evil To lay him open from thigh to neck. Selah.

esv.text: You went out for the salvation of your people, for the salvation of your anointed. You crushed the head of the house of the wicked, laying him bare from thigh to neck.  Selah

cnv.text: 你出來救拔子民，拯救你所膏立的。 你擊打惡人的房頂， 使根基全然顯露。

ccb.text: 你出来是为了拯救你的子民， 拯救你膏立的王。 你打垮邪恶之人的首领， 从头到脚彻底毁灭他们。（细拉）
